description: Live AI video performance dashboard. Panels use selected-range streaming performance history plus orchestrator-level SLA views; live operational telemetry belongs on the Live AI Video Operations dashboard.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT hour AS time,
    ifNull(sum(avg_e2e_latency_ms * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0), 0) / 1000.0 AS avg_e2e_latency_s
FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
  AND avg_e2e_latency_ms > 0
  AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
  AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
  AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), ifNull(orch_address, '')))
GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
interval_fps AS (
    SELECT ifNull(orch_address, '') AS orch_address,
        hour AS time,
        sum(avg_output_fps * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0) AS avg_fps
    FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
      AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
      AND ifNull(orch_address, '') != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
    GROUP BY orch_address, time
),
top_orch AS (
    SELECT orch_address
    FROM interval_fps
    GROUP BY orch_address
    ORDER BY avg(avg_fps) DESC
    LIMIT 8
)
SELECT f.time,
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(f.orch_address, 8), '...', right(f.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator ENS",
    f.avg_fps AS "Avg FPS"
FROM interval_fps f
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = f.orch_address
WHERE (('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '') AND f.orch_address GLOBAL IN (SELECT orch_address FROM top_orch)
    OR ('${orchestrator:csv}' != '__all' AND '${orchestrator:csv}' != '' AND has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), f.orch_address)))
ORDER BY f.time

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
stream_orch AS (
    SELECT
        stream_id,
        argMaxIf(orch_address, hour, orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != '') AS orch_address
    FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
      AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
    GROUP BY stream_id
    HAVING orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != ''
),
top_orch AS (
    SELECT orch_address FROM stream_orch GROUP BY orch_address LIMIT 8
)
SELECT w.hour AS time,
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(so.orch_address, 8), '...', right(so.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator ENS",
    sum(w.video_jitter_sum) / nullIf(sum(w.sample_count), 0) AS "Avg Video Jitter"
FROM naap.agg_webrtc_hourly w
JOIN stream_orch so ON so.stream_id = w.stream_id
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = so.orch_address
WHERE $__timeFilter(w.hour)
AND (
    ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '') AND so.orch_address GLOBAL IN (SELECT orch_address FROM top_orch)
    OR ('${orchestrator:csv}' != '__all' AND '${orchestrator:csv}' != '' AND has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), so.orch_address))
)
GROUP BY time, "Orchestrator ENS" ORDER BY time

SELECT hour AS time,
    ifNull(nullIf(canonical_pipeline, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
    ifNull(sum(avg_output_fps * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0), 0) AS avg_fps
FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
  AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
  AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
  AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), ifNull(orch_address, '')))
GROUP BY time, pipeline ORDER BY time

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label, org
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
eligible_orch AS (
    SELECT orch_address
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
    WHERE orch_address != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
),
windowed_sla AS (
    SELECT s.orchestrator_address,
        s.window_start,
        s.requested_sessions,
        s.pipeline_id,
        ifNull(s.model_id, '') AS model_id_key,
        ifNull(s.gpu_id, '') AS gpu_id_key,
        s.sla_score
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla s
    INNER JOIN eligible_orch eo ON eo.orch_address = s.orchestrator_address
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.window_start)
      AND s.orchestrator_address != ''
      AND s.sla_score IS NOT NULL
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT orchestrator_address,
        argMax(sla_score, tuple(window_start, requested_sessions, pipeline_id, model_id_key, gpu_id_key)) AS latest_sla_score
    FROM windowed_sla
    GROUP BY orchestrator_address
)
SELECT ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(ranked.orchestrator_address, 8), '...', right(ranked.orchestrator_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    toFloat64(round(assumeNotNull(ranked.latest_sla_score), 2)) AS "SLA Score"
FROM ranked
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = ranked.orchestrator_address
ORDER BY "SLA Score" DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Orchestrators by SLA Score (selected range)

targets.rawSql:
WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
agg AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        ifNull(nullIf(canonical_pipeline, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
        countDistinct(canonical_session_key) AS active_streams,
        sum(avg_output_fps * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0) AS avg_fps,
        ifNull(sum(avg_e2e_latency_ms * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0), 0) / 1000.0 AS avg_e2e_latency_s
    FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
      AND orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != ''
      AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    GROUP BY orch_address, pipeline
),
eligible_pairs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT orch_address, pipeline
    FROM agg
),
latest_sla AS (
    SELECT s.orchestrator_address,
        ifNull(nullIf(s.pipeline_id, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
        argMax(s.sla_score, tuple(s.window_start, s.requested_sessions, ifNull(s.model_id, ''), ifNull(s.gpu_id, ''))) AS latest_sla_score
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla s
    INNER JOIN eligible_pairs ep
        ON ep.orch_address = s.orchestrator_address
       AND ep.pipeline = ifNull(nullIf(s.pipeline_id, ''), 'unknown')
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.window_start)
      AND s.orchestrator_address != ''
      AND s.sla_score IS NOT NULL
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
    GROUP BY s.orchestrator_address, pipeline
)
SELECT ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(a.orch_address, 8), '...', right(a.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    a.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    a.pipeline AS "Pipeline",
    a.active_streams AS "Active Streams",
    round(a.avg_fps, 2) AS "Avg FPS",
    round(a.avg_e2e_latency_s, 3) AS "Avg E2E Latency (s)",
    round(latest_sla.latest_sla_score, 2) AS "SLA Score"
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN latest_sla ON latest_sla.orchestrator_address = a.orch_address AND latest_sla.pipeline = a.pipeline
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = a.orch_address
ORDER BY isNull(latest_sla.latest_sla_score) ASC, latest_sla.latest_sla_score DESC, a.active_streams DESC, a.avg_fps DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Orchestrators (selected range: Streams, FPS, Latency)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE org != '' AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE org != '' AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE org != '' AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE org != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM (SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT canonical_model AS model_id FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE canonical_model != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE model_id != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE model_id != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))) AS models WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM (SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT canonical_model AS model_id FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE canonical_model != '' AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE model_id != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT model_id FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE model_id != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))) AS models WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id

list.definition: WITH live_orch AS (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hardware_present = 1 AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orchestrator_address AS orch_address FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE orchestrator_address != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE orch_address != '' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))) SELECT i.orch_address AS __value, i.orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity i INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM live_orch) l ON l.orch_address = i.orch_address WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), i.org)) ORDER BY __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: WITH live_orch AS (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND hardware_present = 1 AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orchestrator_address AS orch_address FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla WHERE orchestrator_address != '' AND window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.canonical_status_hours WHERE orch_address != '' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, ''))) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state WHERE orch_address != '' AND last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ifNull(pipeline, '') = 'live-video-to-video' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))) SELECT i.orch_address AS __value, i.orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity i INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM live_orch) l ON l.orch_address = i.orch_address WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), i.org)) ORDER BY __text

title: NaaP: Live AI Video Performance
